articles.title: Bill Cosby loses sex assault lawsuit and faces a $19 million judgment
articles.description:
A California jury found that Mr. Cosby had abused Donna Motsinger in 1972 after inviting her to attend one of his comedy shows.

The post Bill Cosby loses sex assault lawsuit and faces a $19 million judgment appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: California jury found Bill Cosby guilty of abusing Donna Motsinger in 1972.
Cosby faces a $19 million judgment from the lawsuit verdict.
Boston residents may see renewed discussions on sexual assault awareness and justice.

articles.title: Hundreds go on strike at major Navy shipbuilder in Maine over wages and benefits
articles.description:
The Bath Marine Draftsmen's Association went on strike at General Dynamics Bath Iron Works after members voted to reject the shipyard's proposed wage offer over the weekend.

The post Hundreds go on strike at major Navy shipbuilder in Maine over wages and benefits appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Hundreds of Bath Marine Draftsmen's Association members went on strike over wage disputes.
The strike occurred at General Dynamics Bath Iron Works after a rejected wage offer.
Boston residents may face delays in Navy shipbuilding projects due to the ongoing strike.

articles.title: ICE officers go to TSA checkpoints at Trump’s direction, while long wait times at airports persist
articles.description:
The officers were not making arrests or screening passengers. The Trump administration vaguely said they would supplement Transportation Security Administration staffing at certain airports.

The post ICE officers go to TSA checkpoints at Trump’s direction, while long wait times at airports persist appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ICE officers are stationed at TSA checkpoints, but not conducting arrests.
Long wait times at Boston Logan Airport continue, affecting travelers.
Trump administration's staffing changes aim to alleviate airport congestion.

articles.title: Supreme Court sounds skeptical of late-arriving ballots, a Trump target
articles.description:
A ruling, likely to come by late June, that bars counting ballots arriving after Election Day would send officials scrambling in 14 states and the District of Columbia.

The post Supreme Court sounds skeptical of late-arriving ballots, a Trump target appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Supreme Court may rule against counting late-arriving ballots by June 2026.
Decision affects 14 states and D.C., including Massachusetts' election processes.
Local officials may face challenges ensuring timely ballot processing for Boston voters.

articles.title: ESPN reporter explains why June 1st could be a big day for teams looking to trade for A.J. Brown
articles.description:
The salary cap implications of acquiring Brown could change substantially after that date passes

The post ESPN reporter explains why June 1st could be a big day for teams looking to trade for A.J. Brown appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: June 1st could significantly alter A.J. Brown's trade value for NFL teams.
Teams like the New England Patriots may benefit from salary cap changes post-June 1.
Boston residents could see increased trade activity impacting local NFL fan engagement.
